testsuite.name: io.github.eucsoh.integration.RealLogsIntegrationTest

testcase.name: real logs analysis pipeline runs end-to-end()
real logs folder structure is correct if it exists()

testsuite.system-out:
✓ Found 7 real log files in src/test/resources/real_logs Running full analysis pipeline... [calibrateEa] Calibrated Ea=10.0kJ/mol (T range: 22.0–35.0°C, n=7) ✓ Analyzed 7 logs ✓ Inferred pack: 32S, 118.4V nominal ✓ Req_median threshold: μ=0,0428Ω, σ=0,0359Ω ✓ All critical metrics present ✓ Km range: 2293 - 7929 km (Δ=5636 km) ✓ Detected 4 alarms - Gaussian: 4 alarms ✓ Summary built successfully Req band: 0,0081 - 0,0462 Ω Pack: 32S, R_pack=0,448Ω
✓ Real logs integration test PASSED ✓ Found 7 valid CSV files in real_logs folder
